case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ANGELA BRISEL SOTO MEJIA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED FEB-14-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SOTO MEJIA, ANGELA BRISEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2019 - SOFIA REYES AS LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST PRESENT FOR PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM JEFFREY WOHL; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SOTO MEJIA, ANGELA BRISEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
